theme: spirograph portfolio filling an annulus evenly
title: Spirograph Portfolio for Annulus Coverage
strategies: naive full-budget baseline: Q evenly-spaced curves with minimal pen offset (checker's own reference construction)
greedy per-curve maximization: pick each curve's (R,r) coprime for max petal count, maximize pen offset, ignore how R interacts with the fixed sampling budget S

insight-driven portfolio: pick R values coprime to the sampling budget S (not merely coprime to r) so every curve sweeps all S distinct angle indices (a fine, full sweep of its band, up to the harmless left-right symmetry of cos), and use phase offsets to make any forced non-coprime curve's collapsed points complement the bins already covered by other curves
